# status [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Operator

## Purpose

Usage: hotam status [--domain <path>] [--today YYYY-MM-DD] [--json]. Single-shot compact summary combining what-now's top action + debt (internal/diagnose), due's freshness counts (internal/freshness), and all-violations' violation count (internal/invariants), so an agent doesn't need to run all three separately. Never gates; exit code always 0.
